title: Tensura: Audio Fixes
description: Rebalances and Redoes the Sound Files for Tensura: Reincarnated to make it more balanced and better on the ears, and user experience.
body:
# NOTE AS OF Tensura version 1.0.0.5, this pack has become depracted

This simple Texturepack replaces all the Tensura Audio with updated and fixed Codecs so that it could be used with proper Sounds.json configuration such as Volume and Pitch settings, aswell as Audio Drop-Off after certain range away from audio source.
